features.name: mux conditional expression with signed integer operands
features.description: Code should include a ternary/mux conditional expression where all operands are declared as signed integers, exercising canonicalization paths that must respect signedness

features.name: mux conditional expression with unsigned integer operands
features.description: Code should include a ternary/mux conditional expression where all operands are explicitly declared as unsigned integers, triggering non-signless integer handling in mux canonicalization

features.name: mux with $signed cast on operand
features.description: Code should include a mux conditional expression that uses $signed() system function on one or more operands to force signed interpretation, stressing mux canonicalization with mixed sign contexts
